creator: fsbruva@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Anton Evel from comment #3)
Good afternoon-

I had same issue. I reverted the SHA256 checksum portion of this commit https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=8d03cff7a66959dde5e749483ddb4a4e1c38ab7d

in order to get it to build. When I reverted the entire commit, I got a failed build because the size was wrong (size mismatch: expected 5395, actual 5375).
